matchedFacts: Each philosopher requests fork access through namespace-scoped leases in MemQ.
Odd philosophers acquire left-then-right while even philosophers acquire right-then-left to break deadlock.
Resolved contention summaries are written to _commons as resolved_issue intelligence by default.

payload.answer:
- Each philosopher requests fork access through namespace-scoped leases in MemQ.
- Odd philosophers acquire left-then-right while even philosophers acquire right-then-left to break deadlock.
- Resolved contention summaries are written to _commons as resolved_issue intelligence by default.
